channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish left on walkway first left off Scoresby Street, 3rd March
item.description:
The stuff has been there
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-17, Rotherham Walk, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black Belmont bike frame, 3rd March
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Westbourne Road, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 3rd March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish comprising five very heavy thick plastic bags some of which seems to contain food waste. Ironically situated diagonally across the road from a notice warning fly tippers are being watched. I only wish this were true! The top end of Copers Cope Road and Lower Worsley Bridge Road are plagued by rubbish dumped out of car windows plus the sports people who use the extensive facilities associated with Crystal Palace and Kent County Cricket who also seem to enjoy chucking their rubbish on the ground. I am a street friend and frankly I am getting fed up clearing up this mess so frequently.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflow bins, 3rd March
item.description:
There’s a lot of people who do not understand how to deal with rubbish. They need to be looked after and get individual attention with a chance to ask questions in their own language. If not, this epidemic with get worse. I suggest an idea …….recruit bin buddy volunteers and locals can help.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Brunswick Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 3rd March
item.description:
Rubbish Dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping of Mattress' and Cupboards, 3rd March
item.description:
Fly Tipping of Mattress' and Cupboards in 2 spots on Wallhouse Road and closer to the Darent Industrial Estate in the ditches/dykes causing an issue, and over spilling into the road again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ray Lamb Way, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on Marion’s way, just of Dolben st, 3rd March
item.description:
Waste needs removing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marion's Way, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Appledore Crescent by entrance Ockley Court car park in road, 3rd March
item.description:
The road has subsided and has dropped about 150mm on the right hand side into the kerb. Please can this be looked into with a matter of urgency as it is potentially dangerous.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Appledore Crescent, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging, 3rd March
item.description:
Graffiti on the walls along Deal Porters Way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deal Porters Walk, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No cover, 3rd March
item.description:
No cover

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenoaks Way, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in flower beds surrounding Albion School playground, 3rd March
item.description:
There is a lot of litter in the flower beds surrounding the school playground on the Clack Street Side. There is also a lot of litter in the immediate area, particuarly in the flower beds on the pedestrainsed cut through between Clack Street and Swan Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drains and speeding cars, 3rd March
item.description:
Everytime it rains, the drain is blocked. When I walk to uni, myself and several others have been completely drenched when cars speed past the corner of the church. There are really 2 problems, speeding cars and blocked drains
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Garden waste and abandoned car next to waste, 3rd March
item.description:
The waste has been here for a while. So has the black mercedes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shattered glass on street, 3rd March
item.description:
This has not been cleaned up since last year. I am not sure who's responsible for this,but it's very unsafe as children want to pick it up. Very unsafe,and same for buggies too as can ruin the tyre

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mulgrave Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter in the grassy area surrounding the children's play park, 3rd March
item.description:
There is a lot of litter in the grassy area surrounding the children's play park. Lots in the rose beds and around the table tennis. It's a gated area for children to play safely, but it is not pleasant to do so
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deal Porters Walk, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on parking signs, 3rd March
item.description:
Can you ease remove graffiti from parking permit signs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 151, Friary Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2ft hole, 3rd March
item.description:
Don't know if 6 months is generous but you swerve to avoid it as its so big. This could cause an incident .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping., 3rd March
item.description:
There has been rubbish/flytipping dumped under the bridge on foxhole road again. Can this be collected please.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foxhole Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish., 3rd March
item.description:
Same, same.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arcola Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pavements are filthy due to debris from industrial lorries, 3rd March
item.description:
This is an ongoing problem with so much dust, bricks and stones on the pavement where the Lorries are mounting the pavement. It is so dangerous as well when walking down this section of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, North Cray Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
